# AgentAPI Documentation

AgentAPI is a lightweight Python framework for building agent backends with FastAPI-style ergonomics. It provides provider abstraction, tool calling, conversation memory, and streaming-first APIs.

## Documentation Sections

- [Home](index.md)
- [Installation](installation.md)
- [Getting Started](getting-started.md)
- [Memory](memory.md)
- [Providers](providers.md)
- [Tool Calling](tools.md)
- [Streaming](streaming.md)
- [CLI](cli.md)
- [API Reference](api-reference.md)
- [Deployment](deployment.md)
- [FAQ](faq.md)
